steps.title: Locate the median on the box plot
steps.content: In a box plot, the median is the vertical line that divides the box. On this plot, that line falls just past 7,000 on the axis (between the 7,000 and 8,000 tick marks).

steps.title: Match the reading to a choice
steps.content: Of the answer choices, 7,067 is the value closest to where the median line sits on the axis. That matches choice B — B is correct.
